metadata.title: Frites & Co | Burger House since 2010
metadata.description: The best burgers in Charleville-Mézières. Frites & Co, your burger house since 2010.

about.title: About us
about.paragraph-1: Welcome to Frites & Co, in the heart of Place Ducale in Charleville-Mézières. Here, everything is homemade: our artisan burgers, our hand-cut Belgian-style fries, and our quality sauces.
about.paragraph-2: Far from standardized chains, we offer authentic and delicious cuisine. Vegetarian, fish or gourmet — each dish is prepared with passion, to order.

burgers.title: Our homemade burgers
burgers.description: Artisan buns, quality beef patties, fresh vegetables and homemade sauces.

frites.title: Double-cooked fries
frites.description: Hand-peeled daily, cooked Belgian-style in beef fat.

snacks.title: Our delicious snacks
snacks.description: Nuggets, wings, onion rings... All our sides are homemade.
